PC          Instruction         Machine Code
---------------------------------------------------------------------------
0x0000		lw a4,30(s3)        00000001111010011010011100000011
0x0004		add s2,s3,s4        00000001010010011000100100110011
0x0008		sub s2,s2,s2        01000001001010010000100100110011
0x000c		jalr ra,a4,-03      11111111110101110000000011100111
0x0010		addi s4,s3,1        00000000000110011000101000010011
0x0014		sw s4,23(s4)        00000001010010100010101110100011
0x0018		sub s9,s1,s3        01000001001101001000110010110011
0x001c		or s1,s9,s7         00000001011111001110010010110011
0x0020		srl s10,a2,a4       00000000111001100101110100110011
0x0024		beq zero,zero,0     00000000000000000000000001100011
